rows.label: tlk41100126_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Dammit! I just keep
losing over and over!

rows.label: tlk41100126_03_msg0002
rows.name:
That Luchini! He won't
let me win at all!

rows.label: tlk41100126_03_msg0003
rows.name:
But, it's still fun even
when I lose. Playing with
friends is a good thing.

rows.label: tlk41100126_03_msg0004
rows.name:
It might sound like I'm just
being a sore loser, but next
time I'll win for sure!
